name: ds-team

owner.name: OCHA Centre for Humanitarian Data — Data Science

description: OCHA CHD Data Science team plugins: KB access, data conventions, HDX branding. Enable per repo via checked-in .claude/settings.json, or per user for always-on. No version fields on purpose: git-SHA versioning means every merged commit auto-deploys.

plugins.name: kb-access
plugins.description: Team knowledge-base access: kb-search + kb-doctor skills, plus a SessionStart hook that clones/updates the local KB (and internal companion) automatically

plugins.name: data-conventions
plugins.description: Team defaults for data work: blob-io skill (ocha-stratus blob/Postgres I/O) + advisory conventions (paths, time columns, CRS, uv, marimo)

plugins.name: hdx-brand
plugins.description: HDX v2 design system for anything visual: tokens over invented hexes, component vocabulary, dataviz ramps
